mapper.select: SELECT DATE(completed_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(duration_seconds), 0) AS duration FROM user_training_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND completed_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE(completed_at) ORDER BY DATE(completed_at) DESC
SELECT exercise_id AS exerciseId, COUNT(*) AS count FROM user_training_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY exercise_id ORDER BY count DESC
